default.title: h1, h2, .title, .cover-info h2, .book-title, .truyen-title, [property='og:title']
default.author: [class*='author'], a[href*='tac-gia'], a[href*='author'], .tac-gia, [property='books:author']
default.cover: .cover img, .book-info img, [src*='cover'], .cover-wrapper img, .book-cover img, img.cover, .thumb img, [property='og:image']
default.tags: .tags a, a[href*='the-loai'], .genres a, .info a[href*='category'], [class*='tag'] a, [class*='category'] a
